game_info.title: Tower Fortress: Ascension
game_info.concept:
A mysterious tower has risen! It emits plumes of noxious green smoke from

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/tower-fortress/id1290165431

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

A mysterious tower has risen! It emits plumes of noxious green smoke from
its summit making people sick. Strange creatures infest the tower but if
nobody tries to ascend it we will all be doomed!

Are you that hero?.....

Features:

-Randomised for replay. Every run is different!
-Evolve your abilities and skill to progress ever further up the tower!
-4 Themed zones to ascend!
-Unique hazards and monsters to each zone!
-4 Epic End Zone Boss Fights!
-Loads of Gun Types including, Laser, T Gun, Bubble Gun and Shotgun!
-25 Suits to unlock each with unique abilities that affect play.
-Upgrade yourself at the end of each level with 20 upgrade abilities!



-Important information-
This game contains third party advertising and cross promotion for other nitrome games, both which can be removed via a one time In App Purchase.
game_info.description: Tower Fortress: Ascension is a vertical platformer shooter where you must climb a procedurally generated tower infested with monsters. As a hero clad in a specialized suit, you must jump across platforms, dodge hazards, and blast enemies to reach the summit. Beware the rising toxic smoke from below—keep moving upward or perish! Collect weapon upgrades and health packs to survive the ascent and defeat the guardian at the top.
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Left/Right: Move horizontally
- Space: Jump (Press again in mid-air for Double Jump)
- Z: Shoot weapon
- Shift: Dash (Invulnerable for a split second)
- Enter: Start Game
- P or Esc: Pause/Unpause
- R: Restart Game (from Game Over screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Verify basic movement and physics stability.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The test inputs random movement commands (left, right, jump) to ensure the player character interacts with gravity and platforms without falling through the world or crashing the game loop.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The game should run for at least 600 frames without errors. The player's position should change, and the game phase should remain "PLAYING" or transition to "GAME_OVER_LOSE" validly (e.g., falling into smoke).

TEST_2.test_description: Test winning condition and shooting mechanics.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The bot attempts to ascend by constantly jumping and moving towards the center, while spamming the shoot button to clear enemies. It simulates a "speedrun" attempt.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player should ascend significantly higher than the starting point. The test is considered successful if the player survives for a prolonged period or reaches the win state/boss area.
